container.label: Becoming a CNA in Delaware
container.intro: Complete 150 hours of training, pass the Prometric exams, and get listed on the Delaware Nurse Aide Registry via DHCQ.

variants.description: Information on how to become a CNA in DE.

variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA license to Delaware.

hero.title: Becoming a CNA in Delaware
hero.dek: Learn Delaware DHCQ requirements, complete a 150-hour approved training program, and prepare for the Prometric skills and knowledge tests.
